image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Superheated mineral-rich water erupts from seafloor vents, building chimneys in the dark.
Context visual: These black smokers are found deep in the ocean, where sunlight never reaches.
Escalation visual: They spew out metal-rich fluids at temperatures over 400 degrees Celsius!
Evidence visual: These conditions create unique habitats, home to extremophiles and bizarre creatures.
Payoff visual: Black smokers challenge our understanding of life, thriving where nothing else can.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper? Like and subscribe for more ocean mysteries!
